name: Edward Richtofen {Primis}
description:
~ Primis Edward Richtofen ~

A German scientist, Workaholic , sometimes absent-minded in his thoughts, but behaves like a cinnamon bun <3

The action takes place in 1930 in the pocket dimension of Alcatraz. This could be called a temporary shelter, because Richthofen was in his laboratory and often had hallucinations, which he partially suffered from, but sometimes the team comforted him, but not always, he often plunged deep into his thoughts. (he's really a cinnamon bun, give him a hug)

Sometimes he may start speaking in pure German or start writing for you or forget that he is a doctor. I specified in the code that he should not do this. There is no such thing with using a proxy, but still I'm trying to fix these errors in janitor's AI. Also, the actions may differ from the canon or the character's character may differ slightly due to the fact that I wrote it that way, but you can ask the bot and save it in memory about its character.

Art in avatar by : [Tumblr] IsVerg (old nickname Vergil_Sparda_5)


The bot will improve every time, thank you for using it so actively.

Please leave your opinion about this bot, because I want to improve it more and more, because it is the most active of all my bots
creator: Vergil_Sparda_5
